home.description: Front-end developer specialised in Vue, React and Angular, with 14+ years of experience — strong in design systems and prototyping.

about.title: About me
about.lead: I'm Denis Ibañez, a front-end developer with 14+ years turning complex products into clear, fast interfaces across Vue, React and Angular.
about.body: What I care about most is design systems and prototyping — the craft of making a UI feel inevitable, consistent and effortless to build on. I work closely with design and product to ship work that lasts.

projects.title: Selected Works
projects.subtitle: A curated collection of digital experiences, architectural visualizations and industrial design concepts. Each project is a precise intersection of function and aesthetics.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: Reflections on collaboration, precision, and the digital work delivered through shared vision.
